Generate the full PWA app-icon set from one source image. Idempotent — skips when outputs are newer than source. Re-runs only when public/favicon.jpg changes.

Deploy the data-*.json.js wrappers from the linktree-owned data hub to dist root, so any consumer can <script src="data-NAME.json.js"> with no fetch / no CORS. Source-of-truth lives in linktree/src/data/ (linktree owns the link data; sibling projects symlink in).
